title: Random Drops
description: Drops completely random items everytime a player breaks a block. Toggleable!
body:
This simple plugin will randomize any item drops from block breaks.

**Supports 1.16 - 1.20** (*Versions before 1.16 most likely work, but I will not provide support for those versions*).

Installation is Simple, just download and drop the jar into your plugins folder, currently only one configuration option is available.

Config:

RandomizeDrops: true (Default), Can be set to '**true**' or '**false**'.

You can reload the config from the console or in-game with the command "**randomreload**", if you have an operator status that is.
